string.name: text_cascading_tips
string.value: Currently, the application name restriction is: mob. If you enter mob, it will show: It was from a mobile device too, and the Card type is: debit

string.name: text_multiple_tips
string.value: Currently the transactionTotal rule blocks values less than 500 and the Card type is debit

string.name: text_priority_tips
string.value: This page tests priority, and applies rules to the order of facts. The Card type is: debit. The card test sets the priority to 10, which is high, and will verify the facts first.

string.name: text_recurssion_tips
string.value: Test the execution cycle within 10 times, test the restart interface, etc.

string.name: text_simple_tips
string.value: The current transactionTotal rule blocks values that are less than: 500

string.name: button_see_rules
string.value: Check whether the rules are met

string.name: text_test_result
string.value: Test result: The current page rule is not a combination verification, and the result only affects the Card type.
